articles.title: 'Nooru Saami' BO day 2: Swasika starrer sees 62.7% growth
articles.description: 'Nooru Saami' witnessed a significant surge in box office collections on its second day, raking in Rs 1.22 crore net, a 62.7% jump from its opening day. The film, directed by Sasi and starring Vijay Antony, has now amassed Rs 1.97 crore net in India. The story centers on a mother's unwavering wish and her sons' diverging paths, with ETimes praising its departure from conventional village drama tropes.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Rajinikanth: ‘Spirituality gives me a lot of power; more than name, fame and money, I seek...'
articles.description: More than fame, fortune, or recognition, veteran actor Rajinikanth believes spirituality is his greatest source of strength. Here's what his quote means.

articles.title: Cocktail 2 box office collection day 2: Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna, Kriti Sanon's rom-com enters Rs 50 crore mark worldwide
articles.description: Cocktail 2, starring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna, has got off to a strong start at the box office. The film has become Shahid Kapoor's second-biggest opener after Kabir Singh. Despite getting mixed reviews, the romantic comedy saw a good rise in collections on its second day. Read on to know how much it earned in India.

articles.title: 'Balan: The Boy' box office collections day 2: Chidambaram's thriller grows 29.1 percent; Crosses Rs 4 crore India Net
articles.description: Chidambaram's latest thriller, 'Balan: The Boy,' is making waves at the box office, with its Saturday collections surging by 29.1 percent to Rs 2.35 crore, pushing the two-day net total past Rs 4 crore. The film saw a significant jump in audience turnout, especially during evening and night shows. Kerala continues to be the strongest market, contributing substantially to the film's impressive run.

articles.title: Dilip Kumar had a second marriage with Asma, 16 years after wedding with Saira Banu: 'Can never forgive myself for the hurt I caused her'
articles.description: Dilip Kumar's brief second marriage to Asma in 1981, a period of turmoil for Saira Banu, is revisited. Asma later sought privacy in Vancouver, lamenting media intrusion and claiming most reports were false. Dilip Kumar, in his autobiography, admitted the marriage was a mistake orchestrated by his sisters, regretting the pain caused to Saira and their subsequent reconciliation.

articles.title: Not a showstopper act
articles.description: Book review: Vishwas Patil’s Marathi novel on the Indian circus is overburdened by research and detail, weakening narrative flow and character depth. The translation struggles and thin characterisation reduce the impact of an otherwise ambitious historical narrative now

articles.title: Quote of the day by Johnny Depp: 'Growing old is unavoidable, but never growing up is possible. I believe you can retain certain things from your childhood if you protect them...' Hollywood icon teaches an important lesson about staying young at heart
articles.description: Johnny Depp's quote of the day reflects on the difference between growing older and losing the spirit of childhood. The actor suggests that while aging is inevitable, people can preserve qualities such as imagination, curiosity, and wonder if they consciously protect them. The quote is often associated with Depp's views on creativity and his role in Finding Neverland. It also offers insight into the life and career of the Hollywood star, whose unconventional roles and enduring popularity have made him one of cinema's most recognizable figures.

articles.title: Gurmeet Choudhary and Debina Bonnerjee enjoy family time during Jamai Shosthi; see pics
articles.description: Debina Bonnerjee and Gurmeet Choudhary recently observed Jamai Shosthi with their daughters, Lianna and Divisha, showcasing their special family moments. Clad in beautiful traditional outfits, they posted delightful photos of a lovingly prepared feast. Gurmeet reflected on his long-held dream of marrying a Bengali woman, a wish granted with Debina. Their transformation from co-stars to proud parents of two girls was beautifully illustrated during the celebration.

He portrays a tough yet empathetic cop, a combination that excites him greatly and promises an engaging performance.

articles.title: Hollywood Mourns James Burrows, The Director Who Helped Create Friends Magic
articles.description: Television legend James Burrows, the iconic director behind Friends, Cheers, Frasier, Will & Grace, Taxi and many more beloved sitcoms, has passed away at the age of 85. With a career spanning over five decades, more than 1,000 TV episodes, and 11 Emmy Awards, Burrows helped shape modern television comedy. Tributes are pouring in from across Hollywood as fans remember the man whose work brought laughter to millions around the world.

articles.title: All about the ‘House of the Dragon’ Season 3 cast changes
articles.description: Anticipation is high for 'House of the Dragon' Season 3, promising more intense battles. Several key characters are returning, including Rhaenyra Targaryen and Alicent Hightower. However, some beloved figures like Rhaenys Targaryen and the Cargyll twins will not be back due to their fates in previous seasons. The new season also introduces fresh faces and a recast role for Princess Jaehaera Targaryen, set to premiere on June 21, 2026.

articles.title: Katy Perry announces new single 'Watch It Burn', set for June 25 release
articles.description: Katy Perry has announced her new single, 'Watch It Burn', releasing on June 25. The singer unveiled the cover art and shared that the song explores themes of suppressed anger and confronting pain from a tough year, following her 2024 album '143'.

articles.title: Gladiator II failed because it lacked a moral core: Russell Crowe
articles.description: Russell Crowe believes Gladiator II failed to match the original's success because it lacked the "moral core" rooted in Maximus's journey to avenge his family. He said the filmmakers of the sequel didn't understand why the first film was a hit.

articles.title: Shah Rukh Khan's dance at Revati Sule's wedding bash goes viral
articles.description: Shah Rukh Khan's dance at the pre-wedding bash of Supriya Sule's daughter, Revati, has gone viral. SRK was seen grooving with the couple to 'Koi Mil Gaya', with singer Rahul Vaidya sharing the video from the star-studded Mumbai event.

articles.title: Waseem Mushtaq: Music continues to heal and connect with people even decades later
articles.description: Actor Waseem Mushtaq, known for his television roles, cherishes World Music Day for his debut stage performance in a funny Punjabi song. He emphasizes relentless practice for vocal improvement and highlights the pressure of live singing. Mushtaq aims to create soulful, honest, and timeless music, revealing a lifelong passion that predates his acting career. He has five original tracks ready for release, marking a significant return to his musical roots.

articles.title: Icon Star Allu Arjun’s Heartwarming Gesture Lights Up Young Fan Shraddha’s World by a special interaction Through Make-A-Wish India
articles.description: Icon Star Allu Arjun enjoys a massive fan base across the globe. He has won the hearts of fans of all age groups with his humble nature and the admiration he showers upon them. Known for his deep connection with fans, the actor has consistently shown affection and care, especially towards children. Beyond entertaining audiences on screen, he often takes time to support meaningful causes and create moments of happiness for those who admire him. Just like that, for young Shraddha, there was one dream that stood above all others, meeting her favorite star, Icon Star Allu Arjun. Thanks to the efforts of Make-A-Wish India and the actor's warm support, that dream turned into a beautiful reality. The special interaction brought immense joy to the young girl, proving once again how a simple gesture from a beloved celebrity can create a lifelong memory and inspire hope. During their heartfelt conversation, Allu Arjun spent quality time interacting with Shraddha and made her feel truly special. One of the most delightful moments came when she enthusiastically recreated the iconic Pushpa dialogue, Jhukega Nahi Saala, leaving the actor impressed and amused. The interaction was filled with smiles, laughter, and genuine warmth, reflecting the comfort and happiness she experienced while meeting her favorite star. The actor went a step further by inviting Shraddha to Hyderabad to meet him in person, making the interaction even more memorable. During their conversation, Allu Arjun asked her about her future aspirations. With confidence, Shraddha shared that she dreams of becoming a doctor. The encouragement she received from the actor added to her excitement and strengthened her belief. His interaction with Shraddha has become memorable. Such gestures continue to strengthen the bond he shares with his fans and showcase the compassionate side of the superstar.
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Who is Anne Hathaway's husband, Adam Shulman?
articles.description: Adam Shulman, Anne Hathaway's husband, is anything but a mere celebrity spouse; he embodies creativity in many forms. Aside from supporting Hathaway's Hollywood career, Shulman has made his mark as an actor, producer, and jewelry designer, playing a key role in crafting her engagement ring. Their beautiful love story, which began unexpectedly, now expands to welcome a third child, reflecting Hathaway's honest experiences with motherhood and past struggles with infertility.
